channel.title: BUbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Investigators searching a location in Arizona in disappearance of Nancy Guthrie
item.description: Officials say a person has been detained for questioning in the disappearance of Nancy Guthrie. The Pima County Sheriffâs Department said in a stateme...

item.title: WATCH: Grandson pilots 88-year-old grandmother's 1st flight
item.description: Frances Dahlke took to the skies for her first ever flight with a special person piloting the plane -- her grandson.

item.title: At least 9 dead in Madagascar as Tropical Cyclone Gezani hits the Indian Ocean island
item.description: Authorities in Madagascar say at least nine people have died when buildings collapsed as Tropical Cyclone Gezani hit the Indian Ocean island

item.title: WATCH: Monks on a mission walk 2,300 miles from Texas to DC
item.description: A group of Buddhist monks bearing a message of peace walked into the heart of Washington, D.C., on Tuesday and were greeted by large, joyful crowds as...

item.title: A timeline of Nancy Guthrie's disappearance as search stretches on
item.description: Savannah's Guthrie's mom, Nancy Guthrie, was reported missing Feb. 1, and authorities have still not identified a possible suspect.

item.title: FAA halts all flights into and out of El Paso for 10 days for "security reasons"
item.description: The Federal Aviation Administration has halted all flights into and out of El Paso until very late on Feb. 20 for what it calls "special security reas...

item.title: Nancy Guthrie case: Person released as search for 'armed individual' continues
item.description: The Pima County Sheriffâs Department and the FBI detained and released an individual after questioning them in connection with Nancy Guthrie's abducti...

item.title: WATCH: American families travel to cheer on Team USA at Olympics in Italy
item.description: After Covid restrictions kept loved ones away four years ago, many athletes are now grateful to be surrounded by support.

item.title: FAA closes airspace around El Paso, Texas, for 10 days, grounding all flights
Man who says he was person of interest in Nancy Guthrie's abduction released
item.description: Nancy Guthrie, the mother of "Today" show co-host Savannah Guthrie, was reported missing on Feb. 1 and ransom notes were being investigated.

item.title: Bondi set to testify at House hearing amid scrutiny over Epstein files
item.description: Attorney General Pam Bondi is set to field questions about the Justice Department's handling of the Epstein files.

item.title: Letters found in home show messages between WWII soldier, future wife
item.description: The letters by William Raymond Whittaker and Jane Dean were found in a Nashville home that had belonged to Jane and her siblings.

item.title: FBI search of Georgia election offices relied on years-old claims of fraud, affidavit shows
